{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321130338B2AA9CB1C5A051957999\"}"},"total":13024},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7021197051945829159","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这才是我心里的仙帝，俯视众生，威严不可侵犯，不想特么的其他仙帝重生文一样，像个八辈子没见过女人的圣母🤒🤒"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1634749841,"group_id":"6589905787391314952","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3SrvP/rfQ8kUzVXbfIpvUwE0+dngWQenJE0J/t25RUa","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776616050\u0026x-signature=DrAQG0h3j%2BuZjDoa%2FpIJp7vPNFs%3D","user_id":"4199778309379000","user_name":"江陵的东皇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4199778309379000","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6589905787391314952","book_info":{"abstract":"剑斩风雷遮日月，掌握乾坤捣幽冥。世间人有六十亿，唯我一人称骄狂。仙界青帝重生万年前，降临在繁华都市，灯红酒绿，谁人醉卧美人膝，纸醉金迷，谁人醒掌杀人剑。世人笑我猖，世人笑我狂，你且看，万古之后的天地，世人几经轮回，而我，依然在那，高高在上，俯视众生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/8116b667d7cb6ff67f84682939072404","author":"梦中笔丶","author_id":"","book_id":"6589905787391314952","book_name":"重生之都市狂仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=det /tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cf72518d86ed486a838c281cf59ae3aa~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776616396\u0026x-signature=rZvJblQ5zORY7rHOz81t9AQXuYk%3D","user_id":"4195327311351677","user_name":"我不抽烟(  ･᷄ὢ･᷅)"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4195327311351677","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6589905787391314952","book_info":{"abstract":"剑斩风雷遮日月，掌握乾坤捣幽冥。世间人有六十亿，唯我一人称骄狂。仙界青帝重生万年前，降临在繁华都市，灯红酒绿，谁人醉卧美人膝，纸醉金迷，谁人醒掌杀人剑。世人笑我猖，世人笑我狂，你且看，万古之后的天地，世人几经轮回，而我，依然在那，高高在上，俯视众生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/8116b667d7cb6ff67f84682939072404","author":"梦中笔丶","author_id":"","book_id":"6589905787391314952","book_name":"重生之都市狂仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":36,\"name\":\"重生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36\u0026name=重生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":850,\"name\":\"无脑爽\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850\u0026name=无脑爽\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6600718989477806605","read_count":"45621","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"9979943"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"4536","tags":"都市修真,都市,重生,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/b7230002a85cae77e380~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779253418\u0026x-signature=yWE2EbwNhOwkkazMtiBm2vVU7Oo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321130338B2AA9CB1C5A051957999\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":209,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":19715,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19715,"reply_count":13,"show_pv":189202},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7103564535977706254","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"为啥这本书不火，可能是因为很多人都看不完都市篇就弃了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1653927708,"group_id":"6589905787391314952","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2779183221320247"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6589905787391314952","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.2226219e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读20小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":72226,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7054236215314629413","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的很牛逼，完美的把一个经历种种磨难后的秦长青的性格描写的淋漓尽致，他为帝，看到的事情自然很多，在都市和修真界很多人不理解他的处事方式，认为这是败笔，但这不就是一个帝者所拥有的心智吗？我看了很多小说，大部分的都是借别人之口说猪脚心智坚定，心智如妖，但从没有在实际的情节中体现出来。还有就是仙界，九天十地，上苍之上，主角得那种饱经磨难的性格和对世界的态度让我很喜欢。特别的这本小说不像别的小说为了增加后续的打斗剧情而增加的一些圣母情节，让人看了就感觉特别别扭，感到心烦。怎么说我也是老书虫了，一般的小说真的看不下去，而这本书却非常精彩。还有就是都市篇的开头可能会让人感到熟悉的味道😂😂，但不妨碍后续的精彩。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1642442376,"group_id":"6589905787391314952","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5ZCaeb5o1mcWp0kYf0Oi+yk8vhhu9QAG2vbJ7ONxS4f","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7775feaeedfa467dbea4ff55ed566727~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776622529\u0026x-signature=xXVvhP1B%2FhOB3U9e%2Bqsf0UhmLyU%3D","user_id":"2779183221320247","user_name":"若已梦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2779183221320247","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741409123,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6589905787391314952","book_info":{"abstract":"剑斩风雷遮日月，掌握乾坤捣幽冥。世间人有六十亿，唯我一人称骄狂。仙界青帝重生万年前，降临在繁华都市，灯红酒绿，谁人醉卧美人膝，纸醉金迷，谁人醒掌杀人剑。世人笑我猖，世人笑我狂，你且看，万古之后的天地，世人几经轮回，而我，依然在那，高高在上，俯视众生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/8116b667d7cb6ff67f84682939072404","author":"梦中笔丶","author_id":"","book_id":"6589905787391314952","book_name":"重生之都市狂仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":124,\"name\":\"都市修真\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124\u0026name=都市修真\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":1,\"name\":\"都市\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1\u0026name=都市\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":36,\"name\":\"重生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36\u0026name=重生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=
